spec.name: Mind Filter Field
spec.summary: screens mind energy in a field volume by changing existing conditions
spec.effect_description: The caster inscribes a sigil that screens mind energy in a field volume by changing existing conditions. Effect range: line-of-sight. Persistence: conditional.
